message.content:
@startuml
title nmac notify nbr_pfw mute message

hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #808080
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ParticipantBorderColor #808080
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  GroupBackgroundColor #BFE3EE
  GroupBorderColor #808080
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
  NoteBorderColor #808080
}

box "CNBRPfwPlayCtl" #BFE3EE
participant "INBRPlayCCSink" as INBRPlayCCSink
participant "CNBRPfwPlayCtl" as CNBRPfwPlayCtl
end box

participant "CNBRPfwUICtl" as CNBRPfwUICtl

box "CNBRUIMgr" #BFE3EE
participant "INBRCommand" as INBRCommand
participant "CNBRUIMgr" as CNBRUIMgr
end box

participant "CNBRPlayMgr" as CNBRPlayMgr
participant "CNBRPlayBar" as CNBRPlayBar
participant "CWbxBmpButton" as CWbxBmpButton

INBRPlayCCSink -> CNBRPfwPlayCtl : NotifyInfo
CNBRPfwPlayCtl -> CNBRPfwPlayCtl : NotifyInfo
CNBRPfwPlayCtl -> CNBRPfwUICtl : OnMixerMuteNotify

note over CNBRPfwPlayCtl, CNBRPfwUICtl
NBR_CC_PFW_INFO_MUTE_STATE
end note

CNBRPfwUICtl -> INBRCommand : OnHandleCommand

note over CNBRPfwUICtl, INBRCommand
NBR2_PLAY_UI_MIXER_MUTE_NOTIFY
end note

INBRCommand -> CNBRUIMgr : OnHandleCommand

note over INBRCommand, CNBRUIMgr
NBR2_PLAY_UI_MIXER_MUTE_NOTIFY
end note

CNBRUIMgr -> CNBRPlayMgr : HandleMixerMuteNotify
CNBRPlayMgr -> CNBRPlayBar : MuteVolume
CNBRPlayBar -> CWbxBmpButton : SetChecked

@enduml
